verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. Its canonical location is cytoplasmic/inner-leaflet; it does not reach the outer extracellular face under baseline conditions. However, like several other Src-family and inner-leaflet kinases, LYN has documented cancer-cell ecto-display on the outer leaflet of tumor cells (ecto-LYN), qualifying it as cell_state_induced/contextual. Additionally, activation-induced redistribution in immune cells (B cells, mast cells) has been described. These non-baseline ecto-pools support contextual rather than no.
